name: Required String Field (minLength Workaround)
summary: Required text field with `minLength: 1` workaround for the known JSON Forms empty-string bug
whenToUse: Any required string field — always add minLength: 1 alongside required
This is a mandatory workaround for a known JSON Forms issue
notes: CRITICAL: There is a known JSON Forms bug where an empty string satisfies the `required` rule
Always add `minLength: 1` to required string fields as a workaround
Without `minLength: 1`, users can submit the form with blank required fields
This applies to ALL required string fields — text inputs, text areas, emails, etc.
